trivia_bullets.text: Staff of the Wild Magus (no. 223) is the green member and the last card in the five-card 'Staff of the Magus' cycle at collector numbers 219-223 in M14. Like the Sun Magus and Death Magus, it was not reprinted in M15; only the Flame (red, no. 220) and Mind (blue, no. 221) staffs received M15 reprints.
sources: Scryfall: collector numbers and reprint fields for M14 nos. 219-223

trivia_bullets.text: Triggers on casting any green spell OR any Forest-typed land entering. Green's ramp identity makes land-drop triggers particularly potent here: a ramp player dropping multiple Forests per turn accrues steady incremental lifegain. Fetchlands that find basic Forests also trigger the staff.

"A symbol of ferocity in oppressive times." — no attributed speaker. Of the three flavor texts in this batch ('ruthless,' 'uncertain,' 'oppressive'), 'oppressive' has the most charged register and maps cleanly to green's anti-civilization, anti-dominion philosophical identity without naming it explicitly.
Artist Daniel Ljunggren illustrated three of the five M14 staff cycle cards (Death/219, Sun/222, Wild/223). His personal portfolio site is darylart.com.

EDHREC rank 17,258 — the lowest of the three staffs in this batch and lowest of the five overall by rank, suggesting the green version sees the least Commander play despite green's natural land synergy. Likely outcompeted by stronger green lifegain engines (Courser of Kruphix, Wildgrowth Walker, etc.).
